candidate_llm_application: LLM activation-constraint traversal: systematic fine-tuning teaches model to traverse the null-space of pretraining constraints; haute-école-style activation patterns.

results.title: Uncertain — Possibly Fine-Tuning / Instruction Tuning Constraint Relaxation: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on fine-tuning / instruction tuning constraint relaxation, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (fine-tuning / instruction tuning constraint relaxation); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (dressage terms vs LLM terms).
